title: IT Support Specialist
description: Provide Tier 1/2 help desk support. Troubleshoot Windows 11, Active Directory accounts, networking (DNS, DHCP), and hardware. Manage tickets and document resolutions.

title: Help Desk Technician
description: Front-line help desk technician supporting Windows 11 endpoints, password resets, and customer support. Strong troubleshooting and ticketing skills required.

title: Junior Systems Administrator
description: Junior sysadmin to help manage Linux servers, networking (DNS/DHCP/subnetting), and automate routine tasks with Bash and Python. Git and SSH experience preferred.

title: Junior Python Developer
description: Build and maintain backend services in Python and FastAPI on PostgreSQL. Containerized with Docker, deployed continuously. REST API design and Git required.

title: Desktop Support Engineer
description: On-site desktop support: imaging, hardware repair, Windows 11, Active Directory, and end-user troubleshooting across the office.
